Description: A PowerShell module for reading configuration files (JSON and XML) and expanding environment variables within them.

Manifest.Author: mattman-ps
Manifest.ReleaseNotes:
v0.0.1 (2026-03-01) - Initial release
- Get-ExpandedConfig function to read and expand JSON/XML configuration files
- Automatic file type detection based on extension
- Optional test report parameter for validation
- Environment variable expansion with recursive support
- Comprehensive test suite with 16+ tests
- Sample configuration files demonstrating functionality
